changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.comment: Create repeat_instance table used by ETL
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS repeat_instance ( id varchar(26) PRIMARY KEY, te_uid varchar(11) NOT NULL, -- manifest_uid varchar(64), canonical_element_uid varchar(64), canonical_path varchar(3000) NOT NULL, parent_repeat_instance_id varchar(26), submission_uid varchar(11) NOT NULL, -- repeat_section_label jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, -- category_kind varchar(200), -- category_uid varchar(26), -- category_name varchar(200), -- category_label jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, repeat_path varchar(3000) NOT NULL, repeat_index bigint, client_updated_at timestamp, deleted_at timestamp, submission_completed_at timestamp, created_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), last_modified_date timestamp, last_modified_by varchar(100), created_by varchar(100) );

changeSet.author: hamza (generated)
changeSet.comment: Create element_data_value and unique index used by the ETL
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS element_data_value ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, repeat_instance_id varchar(26), submission_uid varchar(11) NOT NULL, te_uid varchar(11) NOT NULL, -- manifest_uid varchar(64), canonical_element_uid varchar(64), canonical_path varchar(3000) NOT NULL, assignment_uid varchar(11), team_uid varchar(11), org_unit_uid varchar(11), activity_uid varchar(11), -- template_element_config_uid varchar(11) NOT NULL, option_uid varchar(11), -- only for multi select or null value_text text, value_num numeric, value_bool boolean, value_ref_uid varchar(26), value_ts timestamp, deleted_at timestamp, created_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), last_modified_date timestamp, repeat_instance_key text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (COALESCE(repeat_instance_id, '')) STORED, selection_key text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (COALESCE(option_uid, '')) STORED, row_type char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'S' );
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ux_element_value_unique ON element_data_value ( submission_uid, canonical_path, repeat_instance_key, row_type, selection_key );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_element_data_value_submission_repeat ON element_data_value(submission_uid, repeat_instance_id);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.comment: ETL. Create value_as_text generated column to element_data_value table
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE element_data_value ADD COLUMN value_as_text TEXT GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( COALESCE( (EXTRACT(epoch FROM value_ts)) :: BIGINT :: TEXT, value_ref_uid, option_uid, value_text, value_num :: TEXT, value_bool :: TEXT)) STORED;
